blocks.text: Measure the wear and taper of the cylinder block bore. Measure 3 locations each in the X and Y directions. Cylinder Block I.D. Std. X direction 64.000－64.020mm Y direction 64.000－64.015mm Limit value: 1 X direction 64.065mm Y direction 64.065mm Difference between upper and lower I.D. Limit value: 1 0.05mm

items: Do not scratch or dent the gasket mating surface of the cylinder block.
If the limit value is exceeded, the cylinder block should be replaced.

items.text: Do not scratch or dent the gasket mating surface of the cylinder block.
Do not scratch or dent the gasket mating surface of the cylinder block.
If the limit value is exceeded, the cylinder block should be replaced.
If the limit value is exceeded, the cylinder block should be replaced.

blocks.text: Measure the strain on the cylinder block. Cylinder block strain Std. 0.07mm or less

items: If the strain is greater than the standard value, the cylinder block should be replaced.

blocks.text: Inspect pistons for strains and cracks and replace if necessary. Measure the outside diameter (A) of the piston. Piston skirt outer diameter Std. 63.970－63.977mm Limit value: 1 63.97mm Clearance with cylinder block bore (Y-direction) Std. 0.023－0.045mm Limit value: 1 0.055mm

items: If it is below the limit value, the piston should be replaced.

blocks.text: Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
